description: Reads a CSV, gets a fresh Cognito token, calls location/search API per row. Default: runs both Pickup and Delivery in one execution; returns id, company_id, province (and location_type) for each location.

capabilities.name: location_search
capabilities.description: Process CSV: OAuth2 token, then location/search API per row. Default (both): CSV must have all four columns; runs both Pickup and Delivery per row; returns id, company_id, province, location_type. Set location_type to Pickup or Delivery to run only one.

csv_path.description: Absolute path to the input CSV.

location_type.description: Default both: run Pickup and Delivery. Pickup or Delivery: run only that type.

transit_time_xlsx_path.description: Absolute path to 'Transit Time - BOT (PROD).xlsx' (Holidays sheet). Required for payload date adjustment when running both.

output_csv_path.description: Optional. When running both: write one row per payload to this CSV (Item ID, JSON Request, JSON Response, Description, PO, Vendor #, dates, quantities, origin/destination, parties, service, API Call Result, etc.).

author: neehar
